title: What My Family Does
scene: 家人各做什么工作、喜欢什么

sentences.text: "What does your mother do?" my friend asks.
sentences.gloss: 我朋友问：“你妈妈是做什么的？”

sentences.text: My mother is a doctor, and she works in a big hospital.
sentences.gloss: 我妈妈是医生，她在一家大医院工作。

sentences.text: My father is a teacher, and he likes his job.
sentences.gloss: 我爸爸是老师，他喜欢他的工作。

sentences.text: My aunt is a nurse, and she helps sick people every week.
sentences.gloss: 我姑姑是护士，她每周都照顾生病的人。

sentences.text: My uncle is a farmer on a farm outside the city.
sentences.gloss: 我叔叔是农民，在城外的一个农场干活。

sentences.text: My grandfather was a bus driver, and my grandmother was a cook in a shop.
sentences.gloss: 我爷爷以前是公交车司机，我奶奶以前是一家店里的厨师。

sentences.text: One friend of my father is in the police, and one works in an office.
sentences.gloss: 我爸爸的一个朋友是警察，另一个在办公室上班。

sentences.text: Every worker is busy and makes money, and my job is to study.
sentences.gloss: 每个上班的人都很忙，都在挣钱；我的工作是学习。
